name: P:GTA.NaturalMotion.HighFallHelper.PdDamping
summary: Damping multiplier of the controller to keep the character at angle aimAngleBase from vertical.  The actual damping is pdDamping*pdStrength*constant*angVel.
remarks:
Default value = 1.0f.
            Min value = 0.0f.
            Max value = 5.0f.
